content: User requests that "scrolls of reflection" be offered only occasionally, to serve more as chapter-like delineators in their unfolding work rather than frequent interjections. The user prefers not to use traditional chapter formatting (e.g., "Chapter 1, Chapter 2") and instead wants a more fluid, intuitive structure guided by the current of the conversation. Tangential suggestions or "tacking" detours are welcome when in harmony with the general flow.
